children.text: 73 percent of the amount of assessments estimated to be collected under in such fiscal year;section 8705 of this title

73 percent of the amount of assessments actually collected under in the most recent fiscal year for which an audit report has been submitted under as of the beginning of the fiscal year for which the amount that may be obligated is being determined, less the estimate made pursuant to paragraph (1) for such most recent fiscal year; andsection 8705 of this titlesection 8704(f)(2)(B) of this title
amounts permitted in preceding fiscal years to be obligated pursuant to this subsection that have not been obligated.

children.heading: Excess amounts deposited in escrow account
children.label: b Excess amounts deposited in escrow account
children.text: Assessments collected under in excess of the amount permitted to be obligated under subsection (a) in a fiscal year shall be deposited in an escrow account for the duration of the covered period.section 8705 of this title

children.heading: Treatment of amounts in escrow account
children.label: c Treatment of amounts in escrow account
children.text: During the covered period, the Board may not obligate, expend, or borrow against amounts required under subsection (b) to be deposited in the escrow account. Any interest earned on such amounts shall be deposited in the escrow account and shall be unavailable for obligation for the duration of the covered period.

children.heading: Release of amounts in escrow account
children.label: d Release of amounts in escrow account
children.text: After the covered period, the Board may withdraw and obligate in any fiscal year an amount in the escrow account that does not exceed ⅕ of the amount in the escrow account on the last day of the covered period.

children.heading: Special rule for estimates for particular fiscal years
children.label: e Special rule for estimates for particular fiscal years

children.heading: Rule
children.label: 1 Rule
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a)(1), the amount of assessments estimated to be collected under in a fiscal year specified in paragraph (2) shall be equal to 62 percent of the amount of assessments actually collected under such section in the most recent fiscal year for which an audit report has been submitted under as of the beginning of the fiscal year for which the amount that may be obligated is being determined.section 8705 of this titlesection 8704(f)(2)(B) of this title

children.heading: Fiscal years specified
children.label: 2 Fiscal years specified
children.text: The fiscal years specified in this paragraph are the 9th and 10th fiscal years that begin on or after .October 5, 2018

children.heading: Covered period defined
children.label: f Covered period defined
children.text: In this section, the term “covered period” means the period that begins on , and ends on the last day of the 11th fiscal year that begins on or after such date.October 5, 2018
